text.title: Spatial UX Fundamentals Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Spatial UX Fundamentals.

example.scenario: First Vision Pro app: solo designer maps controls to zones (primary actions inner, context middle, ambient outer), uses depth as the primary affordance cue (drop-shadows + parallax), motion velocity capped at 0.4 m/s, FoV 100°. User-testing shows 30-min session with no fatigue complaints.
example.trace: r1-three-comfort-zones → r2-affordances-via-depth-not-color → r3-z-depth-equals-attention → r4-fov-budget-respected → r5-motion-velocity-cap → spec stored
